commands.name: PING
commands.description: Returns PONG

commands.name: ECHO
commands.description: Returns the given argument

commands.name: SET
commands.description: Set key to value

commands.name: GET
commands.description: Get value of key

commands.name: DEL
commands.description: Delete keys

commands.name: RPUSH
commands.description: Append one or multiple elements to a list

commands.name: LPUSH
commands.description: Prepend one or multiple elements to a list

commands.name: LLEN
commands.description: Get the length of a list

commands.name: LRANGE
commands.description: Get a range of elements from a list

commands.name: LINDEX
commands.description: Get an element from a list by its index

commands.name: LSET
commands.description: Set the value of an element in a list by its index

commands.name: LPOP
commands.description: Remove and get the first element in a list

commands.name: RPOP
commands.description: Remove and get the last element in a list

commands.name: LREM
commands.description: Remove elements from a list

commands.name: LTRIM
commands.description: Trim a list to the specified range

commands.name: BLPOP
commands.description: Remove and get the first element in a list, or block until one is available

commands.name: BRPOP
commands.description: Remove and get the last element in a list, or block until one is available

commands.name: TYPE
commands.description: Returns the type of value stored at key

commands.name: XADD
commands.description: Appends a new entry to a stream

commands.name: XRANGE
commands.description: Returns a range of entries from a stream

commands.name: XREAD
commands.description: Read data from one or more streams

commands.name: INCR
commands.description: Increment the value of a key by 1

commands.name: MULTI
commands.description: Start a transaction

commands.name: EXEC
commands.description: Execute a transaction

commands.name: WATCH
commands.description: Watch a variability

commands.name: DISCARD
commands.description: Abort a transaction

commands.name: INFO
commands.description: Get information and statistics about the server

commands.name: REPLCONF
commands.description: Configure replication

commands.name: PSYNC
commands.description: Replication synchronization

commands.name: WAIT
commands.description: Wait for replicas to acknowledge writes

commands.name: CONFIG
commands.description: Get or set configuration parameters

commands.name: KEYS
commands.description: Returns all keys matching pattern

commands.name: SAVE
commands.description: Synchronously save the dataset to disk

commands.name: BGSAVE
commands.description: Asynchronously save the dataset to disk

commands.name: TTL
commands.description: Get the time to live for a key in seconds

commands.name: PTTL
commands.description: Get the time to live for a key in milliseconds

commands.name: ZADD
commands.description: Add a member to a sorted set

commands.name: ZRANK
commands.description: Get the rank of a member in a sorted set

commands.name: ZRANGE
commands.description: Get a range of members from a sorted set

commands.name: ZREVRANGES
commands.description: Get a range of members from a sorted set, by score, with scores ordered from high to low

commands.name: ZRANGEWITHSCORES
commands.description: Get a range of members with scores from a sorted set

commands.name: ZREVRANGE
commands.description: Get a range of members from a sorted set in reverse order

commands.name: ZSCORE
commands.description: Get the score of a member in a sorted set

commands.name: ZCARD
commands.description: Get the number of members in a sorted set

commands.name: ZREM
commands.description: Remove a member from a sorted set

commands.name: ZCOUNT
commands.description: Count members with scores within a range

commands.name: ZINCRBY
commands.description: Increment the score of a member

commands.name: ZPOPMIN
commands.description: Remove and return the member with the lowest score

commands.name: ZPOPMAX
commands.description: Remove and return the member with the highest score

commands.name: HSET
commands.description: Set the value of a field in a hash

commands.name: HGET
commands.description: Get the value of a field in a hash

commands.name: HGETALL
commands.description: Get all fields and values in a hash

commands.name: HDEL
commands.description: Delete one or more fields from a hash

commands.name: HEXISTS
commands.description: Check if a field exists in a hash

commands.name: HLEN
commands.description: Get the number of fields in a hash

commands.name: HKEYS
commands.description: Get all field names in a hash

commands.name: HVALS
commands.description: Get all values in a hash

commands.name: HMSET
commands.description: Set multiple fields in a hash

commands.name: HMGET
commands.description: Get multiple field values from a hash

commands.name: HINCRBY
commands.description: Increment the integer value of a field by a number

commands.name: HINCRBYFLOAT
commands.description: Increment the float value of a field by a number

commands.name: HSETNX
commands.description: Set the value of a field only if the field does not exist

commands.name: HSTRLEN
commands.description: Get the length of the value of a field

commands.name: ACL
commands.description: ACL commands

commands.name: AUTH
commands.description: Authenticate to the server
